parameters.body: ={{ 'MessagingServiceSid=' + $env.TWILIO_MESSAGING_SERVICE_SID + '&To=' + encodeURIComponent($('Detect Booking Intent').first().json.customerPhone) + '&Body=' + encodeURIComponent($('Detect Booking Intent').first().json.aiResponse) }}

parameters.query:
SET LOCAL app.current_tenant_id = '{{ $('Detect Booking Intent').first().json.tenantId }}';
INSERT INTO appointments (tenant_id, conversation_id, customer_phone, service_type, scheduled_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Detect Booking Intent').first().json.tenantId }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Detect Booking Intent').first().json.conversationId }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Detect Booking Intent').first().json.customerPhone }}',
  '{{ $('Detect Booking Intent').first().json.serviceType }}',
  '{{ $('Detect Booking Intent').first().json.scheduledAt }}'::timestamptz
)
ON CONFLICT (conversation_id) DO UPDATE
  SET service_type = EXCLUDED.service_type,
      scheduled_at = EXCLUDED.scheduled_at
RETURNING id, tenant_id, conversation_id, customer_phone, service_type, scheduled_at;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ appointmentId: $json.id, tenantId: $json.tenant_id, conversationId: $json.conversation_id, customerPhone: $json.customer_phone, serviceType: $json.service_type, scheduledAt: $json.scheduled_at }) }}
